contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Stripe session prefill on update_qr_code page (DApp + GAS + dao_client lookup)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/259
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/194
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/16
  
  Details:
  Fixed the bug where picking a Stripe session from the dropdown on update_qr_code.html populated only the session ID, leaving Tracking number and Shipping Provider empty. Three coordinated changes: (1) GAS listUnassignedStripeSessions_ now returns shipping_provider (col M) and tracking_number (col N) per item — function already reads those columns, just dropped them on the floor; no extra round trip; (2) DApp loadStripeSessionsForUpdatePage stashes the per-session info in a Map, selectStripeSessionForUpdate prefills the form fields when an operator picks a session; (3) dao_client lookup_qr_code module — read-only inspector hitting the same GAS endpoint as the DApp page, prints the resolved record (status, email, manager, linked Stripe session + provider + tracking) for an Agroverse QR. Useful before submitting [QR CODE UPDATE EVENT] from the CLI. Verified live against 2024OSCAR_20260121_12. GAS deploy still pending — clasp push to admin@truesight.me project required.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
